title: ShopGuiAddon
description: ShopGuiAddon is a powerful expansion for the ShopGUI+ plugin. It allows administrators to manage prices, create shops, and edit visual menus directly in-game.
body:
## # 🛒 **ShopGuiAddon**

**ShopGuiAddon** is a professional expansion for [ShopGUI+](https://brcdev.net). It allows administrators to manage prices, create/delete shops, and edit visual menus directly in-game. Fully compatible with **Java** and **Bedrock (Geyser)** via an intuitive toggle-switch interface.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/cTTAEETZvjI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## ✨ Key Features

- 🛠️ **Visual Price Editor (GUI):** Real-time adjustments with a Bedrock-friendly toggle system.
- 📦 **Instant Item Addition:** Add items from your hand directly to any shop slot.
- 📂 **Full Shop Management:** Create (`shopcreate`) or permanently delete (`shopremove`) shop files via command.
- 🔗 **Main Menu Manager:** Link, replace, or unlink shop shortcuts in your `/shop` menu.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e47b81349c78de14c8294956aa08bbc0970b9c56.png)
- 🎨 **Display Customizer:** Edit Names and Lores for shop items and menu icons (supports `;` for line breaks).
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88654d5dbb804a6b6bf7df2c2c5fd73770884f4e.png)
- 👤 **Base64 Skin Support:** Custom player heads for main menu shortcuts.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d80c527f270d8f8b4f6c76a9b64e545bc0a9478b.png)

- 👤 **AutoComplet:** Suport Auto Complet commands to know everty sub command or sintax format you must use to full command arguments! =D
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b23923a7a9e7168fc775f3afea46dcf530c2c57_0.webp)


---

## ⚙️ The Toggle System (Bedrock Compatible)

To ensure 100% compatibility with mobile and console players, the editor uses **Toggle Switches** (Slots 26 and 35):
- **White Glass Pane (+):** Addition Mode. Adjustment buttons will **increase** the price.
- **Black Glass Pane (-):** Subtraction Mode. Adjustment buttons will **decrease** the price.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be1b0cf3baa5a91960b7f1b37a27c47e5167d70c.png)

---

## 🧪 Logical Testing Flow (SGA 1.1)
*Copy and follow this sequence to verify all features in order:*

```yaml
# 1. Shop & Item Setup
/sga shopcreate test
/sga itemadd test 10 100 50
/sga edit test 10
/sga item test 10 name &aSpecial_Item
/sga item test 10 lore &7Line_1;&eLine_2

# 2. Main Menu Management
/sga link test 20 DIAMOND_BLOCK
/sga link test 20 GOLD_BLOCK
/sga replace test 20 GOLD_BLOCK
/sga menu 20 name &6&lVIP_Shop
/sga menu 20 lore &7Line_1;&eLine_2
/sga link test 21 PLAYER_HEAD [Base64]

# 3. Cleanup & Finalization
/sga unlink 20
/sga itemremove test 10
/sga shopremove test
/sga reload

# 4. GUI Internal Controls
GUI: Click Slot 26 (Toggle White to Black) -> Verify Decrease
GUI: Click Green Panes (Check Visor)
GUI: Click Slot 26 (Toggle Black to White) -> Verify Increase
GUI: Click Slot 53 (Reload ShopGUI+)
